specializations: Encapsulation for natural and organic formulations
product_highlights: Specialized in natural and organic cosmetic delivery systems
Multifunctional ingredients combining delivery with preservation
Strong technical support for natural formulation challenges
German quality with focus on sustainability
notes: German specialist in natural cosmetic stabilization and delivery systems. Cosphatec uniquely combines preservation and delivery functionality, offering multifunctional ingredients for natural and organic formulations. COSMOS-approved and BDIH/Natrue certified, making them the go-to supplier for clean beauty delivery systems. Strong technical support for formulators working in the natural/organic space.
